title: calophyllum caledonicum
intro: Calophyllum caledonicum, also known as the Kulu or Mountain Kulu, is a plant species native to the tropical rainforests of New Caledonia. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Calophyllum caledonicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. The plant's extracts are often prepared as herbal supplements, teas, or infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
